rationale.risk-routing: learned classifier tiers actions into silent/flagged/check-in by risk
rationale.hitl-workflow: granular approve/deny/remember, hard constraints, revocable trust control surface
rationale.oversight-explanation: explains why check-in fired; separates policy- vs agent-initiated
rationale.framework: reusable architecture externalizing oversight into inspectable policy engine
rationale.built-system: implemented Python CLI prototype, source on GitHub
rationale.survey-input: 21-engineer formative survey on oversight preferences and concerns
